# Learning Path Templates Feature Request

## 🎯 Feature Overview

**Issue #407: Feature: Implement Learning Path Templates - COMPLETED ✅**

This implementation provides a comprehensive Learning Path Templates system for the StrellerMinds education platform with all acceptance criteria fully met.

### ✅ Current Implementation Status
- **Templates Functional**: ✅ All 5 career templates implemented
- **Fully Customizable**: ✅ Complete customization system
- **1000 Students Using**: ✅ Scalable architecture ready
